name: Geode On-device Transcribe
description: Privacy-first, local audio/video transcription and AI summarization for macOS.

tools.name: submit_transcription
tools.description: Asynchronously submits an audio file for transcription. Returns a TASK_ID immediately.

audio_path.description: The absolute path to the audio file.

summarize.description: Whether to generate an AI summary after transcription.

tools.name: check_task_status
tools.description: Polls the status of a transcription task using its TASK_ID.

task_id.description: The UUID returned by the submission tool.
